name: Shadowed Descent
short_description: A series of inexplicable events spread throughout the village, causing chaos and disrupting the balance, leading you to find clues using all available resources to unravel the mysteries that triggered this chaos and disorder.
detailed_description:
Get ready to dive into the show of horrors of Shadowed Descent, psychological horror game. Walk through abandoned and cursed places as you search for hidden evidences. Begin this dark expedition where darkness is your only companion, and your lantern is your last chance to uncover the mystery... Solve enigmatic puzzles and face your fears as you dive into the darkest corners of Blackhaven. Do you have enough courage to discover what lies behind the mystery?




  • Realistic graphics and sounds for a better experience, a minimalist interface that guarantees a totally immersive experience that will always keep you attentive to new events.


  • Use equipment such as a flashlight, lamp and their respective charges, you also have access to a VHS player and a TV to watch tapes left by the last residents.


  • Explore all the haunted buildings spread across the town looking for clues and hauntings.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, German, Spanish - Latin America, Czech, Polish, Turkish, Slovak
*languages with full audio support
